name: IB → option_harvester sync
description: Syncs positions, pending orders, recent trades, watchlists, and daily account balances (cash/NLV/margin) from the logged-in IB portal to the option_harvester backend — manually (Sync now) or on a timer. Sync now is a fast pull (+ pushes OH watchlists to IB and reads them back to verify) that survives switching tabs. A separate Deep sync runs the heavy passes — per-position greeks and exact maintenance margin (what-if), conid re-resolve, and the true underlying conid for held option-only names — which need the IB tab kept in the foreground. Reports each run to the /sync log. Dev capture for building new parsers.
